sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78555" key="parape/ssia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραπέσσια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πεσσός</etym>) <sense id="n78555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">buildings abutting on larger buildings,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.11.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
